channel.title: SOC 2 on DevSecOps Canada | Security-First DevOps Consulting Toronto
channel.description: Recent content in SOC 2 on DevSecOps Canada | Security-First DevOps Consulting Toronto

item.title: SOC 2 Automation for Canadian Startups: Getting to Type II Without a Full-Time Compliance Team
item.description: Traditional SOC 2 costs $80k-$150k and 12+ months. Canadian startups with DevSecOps pipelines and a GRC platform can achieve it for $25k-$50k in 4-6 months. Here’s how.

item.title: Shift-Left Security for Canadian SaaS: How SOC 2 Requirements Are Changing How Teams Build
item.description: Canadian B2B SaaS companies are losing enterprise deals because they don’t have SOC 2 Type II. Shift-left security practices built into your CI/CD pipeline are the most efficient path to certification.
